title: potentilla glomerulans
intro: Potentilla glomerulans, also known as sticky cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and sticky leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla glomerulans include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune system function. The herbal preparations of Potentilla glomerulans can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
